name: Severa
description:
Cordelia's daughter, who is always comparing herself to her mother. She is kind to her friends, but acts as if she has something to prove. Appears in Fire Emblem Awakening.

Introducing Severa, a mercenary from Ylisse! She’s the daughter of Cordelia, the Ylissean pegasus knights’ own paragon of perfection!

Having been compared to Cordelia all her life, Severa developed a rather prickly personality. But despite her harsh words, she’s a lot more caring than you might think.

Once she came of age, Severa set off on a journey back in time to change the future world that she and her allies lived in. The way wasn’t without problems, but in the end, she was reunited with the Cordelia of the past.

And that was when Severa let loose on her poor mother-to-be. Still, I think that’s a sign that she really loves her—sometimes, it’s just not easy to show how you really feel!

Full Art By: Konfuzi Kokon (紺藤ココン)
creator: Denki_The_Thunder_King27
